---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: bobiknaj1229
---

## Summary

A short, clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve, or what gap does it fill? Why is this useful?

> Example: "When simulating to the final, there's no way to see which player scored the most goals across the tournament."

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you imagine this feature would work. Be as specific or as high-level as you like.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you considered, and why you prefer the proposed solution.

## Additional Context

Mockups, examples from other simulators, links to relevant data sources, or anything else that helps explain the request.
